stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In case of failure of the static inverter: (NB: all contactors not mentioned are assumed to remain open)

options.a: AC ESS BUS can be powered, if required, by the EMER GEN if C4.1 is closed.
options.b: AC can be generated by the batteries using the ESS TRU, provided the appropriate contactors are closed.
options.c: AC ESS BUS can be fed by DC ESS BUS.
options.d: DC ESS BUS will not be powered, even if GEN 1 and 2 are supplying AC and the appropriate contactors are closed.
